texto: Davey Boy's Dead was given a new lease on life when doctors transplanted the Dynamite Kidney into his body. That new lease on life came to a sudden and rather hilarious end when the Dynamite Kidney exploded and tore a hole in Davey Boy's side. - The Hills are Alive with the Sound of Zombies
explicacao: Citação de Darrin Mason sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Davey Boy's Dead was given a new lease on life when doctors transplanted the Dynamite Kidney into…” articula vida, humor, short-stories em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e short-stories.
